meta.title: Gymnastics Club Management Software in Spain | Zaltyko - RFEG Management
meta.description: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over RFEG athletes, official categories (Initiation to Elite), competition levels, and licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over RFEG athletes, official categories (Pre-initiation to Elite), competition levels and licenses. Liga Iberdrola, Copa España and more.

federation.name: Real Federación Española de Gimnasia (RFEG)
competitions: Copa de la Reina de Gimnasia Artística

painPoints.generic: Managing federations, licenses and competitions in spreadsheets takes hours you could spend training. Information gets lost, data gets duplicated and errors are constant.
painPoints.specific: Renewing RFEG licenses before each competition, managing autonomic qualifiers for Liga Iberdrola, tracking technical progress by category from Initiation to FIG.
